templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Covers mutual confidentiality obligations between two parties.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Used to specify party details and finalize the agreement by incorporating the standard terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement. Covers the terms under which a vendor provides cloud-hosted software services to a customer.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement. Governs relationships where a customer participates as a design partner to help shape a product before its general release.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement. Defines the uptime commitments, incident response times, and remedies a cloud service provider offers to customers.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement. Covers the terms under which a vendor delivers professional or consulting services to a customer.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement. Establishes the obligations of a data processor when handling personal data on behalf of a data controller, designed for GDPR and similar regulatory compliance.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement. Governs the terms under which a licensor grants rights to use its software to a licensee.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement. Covers the terms of a reseller or referral partnership between two companies.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement. Governs a time-limited, often free or discounted trial of a vendor's product or service prior to a full commercial agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement. Establishes HIPAA-required obligations when a service provider handles protected health information on behalf of a covered entity.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper Standard AI Addendum. Addresses the specific terms around the use of artificial intelligence features within a cloud service, including data usage, model training, and output ownership.
